name: Climbing
description: Scaling vertical heights by finding foot and handholds, using lengths of rope, and the like.

name: Running
description: Maintaining long distance runs or making the most out of a Sprint.

name: Sports Activity
description: Organized play with a narrow spectrum of focused training. Choose a sport or activity not covered by another Skill (like how archery would be covered by Targeting) to gain the benefits of specialization on Strength Skill rolls with that sport.

name: Swimming
description: Traversing aquatic situations, from laps to deep dives.

name: Weapon Trait
description: All weapons of a specific Trait that uses Athletics to attack.

name: Endurance
description: Tapping into your physical reserves, such as on a forced march or going extended periods without fuel.

name: Force
description: Utilizing strength to lift, push, or drag heavy objects, such as pulling significant levels of weight behind you, most often using rope, ties, or yoke. It is a DIF 10 Brawn Skill Test to drag double your Carrying Weight at half Movement rate for one minute; DIF 20 to triple, 30 to quadruple, etc.

name: Mettle
description: When your limits are pushed, how hard you push back, like when you're forced to eject from a crashing spaceship.

name: Distract
description: Pulling another creature's focus away from their task through your physical threats.

name: Frighten
description: Causing another being to panic, likely fleeing from your presence or freezing in place.

name: Taunt
description: Provoking a target to further interact negatively with you.

name: Grappling
description: Overpowering an opponent and holding them against their will.

name: Martial Arts
description: The study and mastery of a power-based Cybertronian martial arts, such as Crystalocution.

name: Weapon Classification
description: A weapon Classification that uses Might to attack, such as heavy swords or clubs.

name: Weapon Trait
description: All weapons of a specific Trait that uses Might to attack, such as Blunt or Silent.

name: Balance
description: The ability to stay upright and in control of your Movements despite outside stimuli or loose or narrow footing.

name: Coordination
description: Using your hands in concert with your body.

name: Escape
description: Working your way out of restraints by twisting, jerking, and bending.

name: Gymnastics
description: Moving gracefully, such as with flips, cartwheels, or parkour.

name: Air
description: Piloting aerial vehicles and flying Alt Modes.

name: Land
description: Bikes, cars, snowmobiles, tanks, and anything in between that run on wheels, treads, or skids, including most Alt Modes.

name: Sea
description: Serving as captain or skipper on anything from a sailing ship to an aircraft carrier, as well as seacraft and submarine Alt Modes.

name: Dexterity
description: Controlling or maneuvering small objects with fine precision.

name: Martial Arts
description: The study and mastery of agile Cybertronian martial arts, such as Metallikato.

name: Weapon Classification
description: A weapon Classification that uses Finesse to attack, such as specific swords or knives.

name: Weapon Trait
description: All weapons of a specific Trait that uses Finesse to attack, such as Maneuver or Sharp.

name: Burglary
description: Picking locks, disabling traps, and leaving no traces behind.

name: Shadow
description: Following a target unseen and utilizing social infiltration, such as blending in with other vehicles or convincingly using temporary modifications such as paint jobs or wraps.

name: Sleight of Hand
description: Utilizing misdirection and manual dexterity to pick pockets, palm objects, plant items, and smuggle things on your person.

name: Stealth
description: Moving and acting quietly while avoiding detection.

name: Vehicular Weaponry
description: Operating as a gunner on a separate vehicle's weapons that aren't your Hardpoint or hand-held weapons.

name: Weapon Classification
description: A weapon Classification that uses Targeting to attack, such as Rifles or Grenades.

name: Weapon Trait
description: All weapons of a specific Trait that uses Targeting to attack, such as Sniper.

name: Insight
description: Judging another's intentions, detecting patterns in speech or behavior, and determining motivations and truth.

name: Investigation
description: Searching an area for specific details, hidden images, items, and other secrets in the scene. Investigation generally takes time — from minutes to hours to comb a location for information.

name: Perception
description: Taking in a scene around you quickly through natural senses. This is not a deep search for specifics, but rather the collective make-up of information about the present scene.

name: Situational Awareness
description: Utilizing trained senses to read a situation for danger, including finding the nearest exits, evaluating the possibility for an ambush (and if so, from where), and other tactical information.

name: Classified Intel
description: Representing a focus on military culture, specifically on secret operations, special forces, enemy dossiers, and other need-to-know intel.

name: History
description: Knowing specific notes or moments in the local history, or the history of a specific culture.

name: Linguistics
description: Studying languages, allowing characters to learn useful phrases, understand meaning even if there is no shared language, and decipher archaic and dead languages.

name: Planetary
description: Knowledge of a specific planet or location outside of Earth or Cybertron, as well as its general geography, history, and inhabitants.

name: Psychology
description: Understanding how the mind works and using that knowledge to predict behavior.

name: Specific Culture
description: Interest in and study of a particular people.

name: Medicine
description: Knowledge of anatomy, diagnosis, care, and treatment. Cybertronians use Science (Medicine) to save organic lives.

name: Specific Subject
description: Expertise in an explicit discipline of Science, such as Biology, Chemistry, Physics, Zoology, and more.

name: Camping
description: Creating a safe, sheltered location outdoors that is protected from the elements and Threats.

name: Foraging
description: Identifying and scavenging Cybertronian food, Energon, and other supplies from the environment.

name: Specific Environment
description: Prowess in specific climate and terrain, such as Deserts, Forests, or the Arctic.

name: Tracking
description: Tracking and following a creature based on signs left behind, from broken twigs to disturbed earth and more.

name: Advanced Technology
description: Knowing what to do when faced with unusual and advanced technology, such as high tech equipment found in government science labs, new Cybertronian tech, or even technology from unknown planetary origins.

name: Communications
description: Experienced with equipment for broadcasting, jamming, unjamming, encryption, and decryption.

name: Computers
description: Using computer software or hardware for intended purposes or otherwise, including modding, hacking, and more.

name: Engineering
description: Working out complex physical problems to create, modify, and destroy machines and objects.

name: Explosives
description: Knowing how to create, arm, and disarm explosive devices.

name: Repair
description: Seeing to the health and well-being of Cybertronians and the upkeep of vehicles.

name: Specific Technology
description: Expertise in one particular type of technology, such as artificial intelligence, drones, mechanics, robotics, and more.

name: Calm
description: Make an aggressive animal comfortable in your presence.

name: Pet
description: Working with an animal companion, although uncommon, to accomplish tasks in concert and communication.

name: Training
description: Teaching animals behaviors, tricks, or talents through repeated reinforcement. This can be helpful in situations where robotic presence isn't conducive to the mission, but where humans can't be trusted.

name: Bluffing
description: Telling outright lies without giving away tells.

name: Disguise
description: Altering your physical appearance, mannerisms, and voice to pass as someone else.

name: Distraction
description: Keeping others' attention on you rather than the world around them through misdirection.

name: Literary Arts
description: Fiction, drama, poetry, and prose.

name: Performing Arts
description: Dance, music, and acting.

name: Visual Arts
description: Architecture, ceramics, drawing, mapmaking, painting, photography, and sculpting.

name: Diplomacy
description: Interacting socially with others in the fashion acceptable for your current situation.

name: Embellishments
description: The ability to pad the truth with additional information and slight alterations to the facts to make them even more attractive of an option.

name: Flattery
description: The ability to use sweet words, friendly descriptions, and potentially sycophantic details to make someone consent to your requests.

name: Truth
description: Using plain and simple facts to make your point of view the obvious choice to follow.

name: Black Market
description: Connecting with and acquiring goods and services outside of traditional means.

name: Crime
description: Using knowledge and lingo to perceive and identify crime and criminal organizations.

name: Gossip
description: The ability to seed the street-level populace with a topic and listen for what kind of rumors, lies, and possible clues come back about it over a short amount of time.

name: Transportation
description: Includes everything from avoiding traffic to the best smuggling routes and even escaping an area or city without being noticed.
